description_long: A mound of wide, flat pasta noodles is generously coated in a rich, reddish-brown tomato and meat sauce, with visible chunks of ground meat and a creamy texture. The pasta is loosely layered and folded, creating a rustic, homemade appearance. Fresh green basil leaves are scattered on top, adding a pop of color and a hint of freshness. The sauce clings to the pasta, pooling in the folds and crevices, and appears to be a classic Italian ragù or Bolognese. The overall shape is irregular and organic, with some noodles protruding at the edges. There is no visible plate or container, and the pasta sits directly on a flat surface.
description: A rustic pile of wide, flat pasta noodles covered in a rich tomato and meat sauce, topped with fresh basil leaves. The dish has an irregular, homemade appearance with visible sauce and meat chunks.
description_view_0: This view shows the pasta mound from the side, highlighting the layered noodles and a generous amount of sauce and basil on top.
description_view_1: The front view emphasizes the central pile of pasta, with the sauce and basil most prominent and the noodles tightly folded.
description_view_2: From this angle, the pasta appears more spread out, with sauce pooling in the folds and fewer visible basil leaves.
description_view_3: This view shows the pasta from another side, with the noodles and sauce forming a compact mound and basil scattered on top.
attribute_placement: sitting as a mound on a flat surface
